g.title: Physical memory representation for O_DIRECT write-ahead logging
Invariant: votedFor is null or CandidateID

ul.li: Persistence: Term and VotedFor must be flushed to stable storage before responding to RPCs.
Log Alignment: Members of LogEntry are ordered to prevent padding holes (8B, 8B, 4B, 4B, 32B, 8B).
Safety: A leader never overwrites or deletes entries in its own log; it only appends.
Alignment: The 64-byte size ensures a single entry fits exactly into a modern CPU cache line.

g.title: Must be persisted before acknowledging AppendEntriesRPC

g.text: SET A=1 | SET B=2 | DEL C
SET A=1 | SET B=2 | DEL C | **SET D=4**

g.title: Physical memory representation for O_DIRECT write-ahead logging
Invariant: votedFor is null or CandidateID
